name: acceptance-e2e
description: Turn a Diolog web feature's requirements into an acceptance-criteria-traceable Playwright e2e UI suite. From a Linear issue # + a plan*.md + the live page, it enumerates every acceptance criterion into a traceability matrix, grounds selectors against the running app (dev-login + company-context), authors specs in the apps/web/e2e harness that assert content/render correctness (a chart actually draws, a figure is actually sourced) rather than mere element presence, runs them with isolation-safe disposable-clone data, and fixes the tractable product bugs the suite surfaces.
